prompt: Three cute, fluffy red panda cubs named Ben, Bin, and Bun. They wear different colored knitted scarves: Ben wears blue, Bin wears yellow, and Bun wears pink. They have big expressive eyes and soft round ears., Three fluffy red panda cubs trying to move a giant honey jar in a cozy wooden cave. One cub is pushing alone looking tired, two other cubs join in helping push from behind. Warm sunlight streaming through a window, watercolor style, soft textures., Focus on the effort and teamwork. Show the transition from struggling alone to succeeding together., Warm, cozy watercolor illustration style with soft pastel colors. Soft lighting, rounded shapes suitable for children aged 3-8. Gentle texture, inviting and friendly atmosphere.
